name: rag-chatbot
title: RAG Chatbot
description: A grounded document support chatbot with preindexed PDF ingestion, pgvector retrieval, and visible tool traces.
docs: Install into a Next.js App Router project initialized with shadcn/ui. This item adds the demo page, chat and indexing routes, client workspace components, pgvector-backed retrieval logic, and the AI Gateway plus DATABASE_URL env vars required for indexing and grounded chat.
